name: ReKlaimed Vines
tagline: Huntingdon County's only winery — family-made, hand-bottled, whole-fruit wines.
seoDescription: ReKlaimed Vines — a family-owned winery in Huntingdon, PA. Hand-bottled dry and whole-fruit wines, slushies, and wine jelly, made by Kristi, Charles and their five kids.

hero.heading: Hand-bottled by one family — all seven of us.
hero.subheading: Huntingdon County's only winery: a family-owned and operated Central Pennsylvania label where every wine is made and hand-bottled by Kristi, Charles, and their five kids.

images.heroAlt: ReKlaimed Vines winery in Huntingdon, PA

about.heading: A true family winery
body: ReKlaimed Vines is a small, family-owned and operated winery in Central Pennsylvania — and proudly Huntingdon County's only one. Together with their five children, Kristi and Charles make and hand-bottle every single wine they sell.

Our fruit wines are made from the whole fruit, which we believe is the secret to their bright, true-to-the-orchard taste. Stop in — you'll find dry wines and fruit wines, slushies, and even wine jelly, and Kristi and Charles will make you feel right at home.

services.title: Whole-fruit wines
services.description: Fruit wines pressed from the whole fruit for a brighter, truer flavor — our signature.

services.title: Dry wines
services.description: A hand-crafted lineup of dry wines for the traditional palate.

services.title: Wine slushies & jelly
services.description: Warm-weather slushies and small-batch wine jelly to take a little home with you.

services.title: Tasting room
services.description: A welcoming room shared with Defiant Distillery, where the whole family says hello.

hoursNote: Hours shift seasonally — give us a call at (717) 363-2090 to confirm before you head out.
